issues.description: Effect structure is incorrect. The card text describes a conditional action: 'You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand' is the condition/cost that enables the power boost. The DSL should use a single effect with FlipLife as a conditional action (thenActions) that triggers PowerBoost, not two separate effects.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and hand discard action is completely unrelated to the card text and should not be present.
FlipLife should be optional (may) and conditional. Current structure treats it as mandatory. The PowerBoost should only occur if FlipLife is performed.
